items.title: Mamata calls for INDIA unity against BJP in Bengal, rules out return of TMC rebels
items.summary: Though she did not name the Congress or the CPI(M), her remarks were seen as an appeal to the TMC's INDIA bloc partners, with whom it has maintained an uneasy relationship in We...

items.title: Lebanese army says troops deploying in 'pilot zone' after Israeli withdrawal
items.summary: A US-brokered agreement should see Israeli troops pulling out of a small part of Lebanon occupied during their conflict with Hezbollah.
